cs-changes: updated_files=$(echo $(git diff --name-only `git merge-base origin/main HEAD` | grep php)); if [ -n "$updated_files" ]; then phpcbf $(echo $updated_files); phpcs $(echo $updated_files); else echo "No modified .php files for PHPCS."; fi;
test-coverage: git diff main...head > /tmp/main.diff; phpcov patch-coverage --path-prefix $(pwd) ./tests/_output/merged.cov /tmp/main.diff || true
echo "open tests/_output/html/index.html" to view the report

packages.description: Newfold Data Module
